description: A portion of a whole, the result of mindful division. It represents not just mathematical fractions but the philosophical understanding that wholes can be shared without being diminished.
rationale: The word 'thepo' begins with the contemplative fricative 'the', suggesting thoughtful division. The plosive 'po' gives each part its own distinct identity. This FV.CV pattern balances the flowing nature of division with the concrete reality of separate parts.
